title: Fix display with no % printing assoc array

features.name: display with associative array argument causing variadic pass error
features.description: Code should include a $display system task call that passes an associative array as an argument, triggering a C++ variadic function error when the associative array is passed through VL_WRITEF

features.name: display with hierarchical name format specifier and complex argument
features.description: Code should include a $display with the %m (hierarchical name) format specifier combined with complex arguments like associative arrays that get forwarded through variadic VL_WRITEF

features.name: display with hash prefix format specifier
features.description: Code should include a $display with the %1# format specifier (print with # prefix) which triggers VL_WRITEF code generation that attempts to pass associative arrays through variadic functions

features.name: associative array with wide element type in display context
features.description: Code should include an associative array with a wide element type (VlWide<N>) that is passed to $display, causing non-trivial type passing through variadic VL_WRITEF
